title: RentGoose — Rent Collection & Landlord Accounting Overview

content.intro: RentGoose is PropertyGoose's integrated rent tracking module. It tracks rent schedules, arrears, and helps you stay on top of payments from your tenants.

sections.title: Key Features
sections.content: RentGoose provides a comprehensive suite of rent tracking tools for self-managing landlords. Key features include: a rent schedule per tenancy showing all due and received payments, an arrears tracking and chase queue to manage overdue rent, automated chase emails at 7, 14, 21, and 28 days overdue, and rent statements for your records.

sections.title: Getting Started with RentGoose
sections.content: RentGoose activates automatically when you create a tenancy in PropertyGoose. There is no separate setup required. Rent due dates are set during tenancy setup and the first month's rent is auto-added. Subsequent months auto-populate as they become due. As you record rent payments, the schedule updates to show paid and outstanding balances. Arrears are flagged automatically when rent becomes overdue.

sections.title: RentGoose is in Beta
sections.content: RentGoose is currently in Beta. Access it via the RentGoose option in the sidebar beta section. As a Beta product, features are being actively refined — use the bug report button within the app to flag any issues you encounter.
